subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the one true Lord, Who through His blessed and most exalted Word hath united the hearts and souls of His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خداوند یکتا را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه مبارکه علیا ما بین افئده و قلوب اولیا الف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayer for healing
